name: Python Py2Exe Image Load
notes:
This rule detects the image load of Python Core indicative of a Python script bundled with Py2Exe.

Covered from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Patrick St. John, OTR (Open Threat Research)
SIGMA Title: Python Py2Exe Image Load
SIGMA Description: Detects the image load of Python Core indicative of a Python script bundled with Py2Exe.


Confidence: MEDIUM

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
when the event matches LOWER("Description") LIKE '%python core%' AQL filter query
when the event matches Process Name (custom) contains any of python

when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files (x86)\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\programdata\anaconda3\%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Python Py2Exe Image Load on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001844) Image loaded
AND when the event matches LOWER("Description") LIKE '%python core%' AQL filter query
AND NOT when the event matches Process Name (custom) contains any of python

AND NOT when the event matches LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\program files (x86)\%' or LOWER("Process File File Path") LIKE 'c:\programdata\anaconda3\%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Python Py2Exe Image Load
Event description: Detects the image load of Python Core indicative of a Python script bundled with Py2Exe.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
